title: Why adding ontologies to LLMs won't yield machine intelligence
summary: 该视频讨论为何将本体论（ontologies）添加到大型语言模型（LLMs）中并不能实现真正的机器智能，指出本体论虽能提供结构化知识，但LLMs缺乏理解与推理能力，无法通过简单添加本体达到人类水平的智能。
highlights: Adding ontologies to LLMs won't yield machine intelligence
Ontologies provide structured knowledge but LLMs lack understanding and reasoning
True machine intelligence requires more than just knowledge injection
